hero.subtitle: About Jobify
hero.title: Building the future of
hero.description: Jobify connects ambitious professionals with companies that value talent, growth, and meaningful work. We make hiring clearer, faster, and more human.

mission.mission-description: To empower people and companies to find the right match through a transparent, intelligent, and accessible hiring platform.
mission.vision-description: A world where every professional can discover opportunities that fit their skills, values, and ambitions — and every company can build teams that thrive.

values.title: What we stand for
values.description: These principles guide how we build Jobify and how we serve candidates and employers every day.

people-first.title: People first
people-first.description: We design for real people — job seekers building careers and teams building companies.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear job details, honest communication, and straightforward processes at every step.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We protect user data, verify opportunities, and create a safe space for professional growth.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve matching, discovery, and tools to make hiring smarter.

story.title: Our story
story.description: From a simple idea to a platform trusted by thousands.
story.content: Jobify started with a clear observation: great talent and great companies were often missing each other. Complicated processes, scattered listings, and unclear expectations slowed everyone down. We built Jobify to bring clarity — one place to discover roles, explore companies, apply with confidence, and hire with purpose. Today, we continue to refine that experience for candidates and recruiters across the region and beyond.

cta.title: Ready to take the next step?
cta.description: Whether you're looking for your next role or your next hire, Jobify is built to help you move forward.

hero.subtitle: Contact Us

hero.description: Have a question about Jobify, partnerships, or support? Send us a message and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

PrivacyPage.subtitle: Legal
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy
PrivacyPage.description: How Jobify collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

sections.title: Information we collect
paragraphs: We collect information you provide when creating an account, applying to jobs, posting roles, or contacting support — including name, email, profile details, resumes, and messages.
We also collect technical data such as browser type, device information, IP address, and usage analytics to keep the platform secure and improve performance.

sections.title: How we use your data
paragraphs: Your data is used to operate the job board, match candidates with companies, process applications, authenticate users, and communicate important account updates.
We do not sell your personal information. Data is shared only with companies you apply to, service providers that help us run Jobify, or when required by law.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: You may access, update, or delete your profile information from your account settings. You can also contact us to request data export or account removal.
If you are in a region with additional privacy rights, we will honor applicable requests in accordance with local regulations.

TermsPage.subtitle: Legal
TermsPage.title: Terms of
TermsPage.description: The rules and guidelines for using the Jobify platform.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using Jobify, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

sections.title: User responsibilities
paragraphs: You must provide accurate information, keep your credentials secure, and use Jobify only for lawful hiring and job-seeking purposes.
Companies are responsible for the accuracy of job listings. Candidates are responsible for the content of applications and uploaded documents.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: Jobify provides a platform to connect employers and candidates. We do not guarantee hiring outcomes, job availability, or the conduct of any user.
To the fullest extent permitted by law, Jobify is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the service.

CookiesPage.subtitle: Legal
CookiesPage.title: Cookies
CookiesPage.description: How Jobify uses cookies and similar technologies.

sections.title: What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help websites remember preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how the site is used.
Jobify uses cookies and similar storage technologies to deliver core functionality and improve your experience.

sections.title: Cookies we use
paragraphs: Essential cookies power authentication, security (including CSRF protection), locale preferences, and session management. These are required for the platform to function.
Analytics cookies help us understand traffic patterns and improve performance. You can control non-essential cookies through your browser settings.

sections.title: Managing cookies
paragraphs: Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. Note that disabling essential cookies may prevent you from logging in or using key features.
For questions about our cookie practices, contact us through the Help Center or Contact page.

SecurityPage.subtitle: Trust
SecurityPage.title: Platform
SecurityPage.description: How Jobify protects your account, data, and hiring workflows.

sections.title: Authentication & access
paragraphs: Sessions use HTTP-only cookies with signed JWT tokens. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt and never stored in plain text.
Role-based access ensures companies, candidates, and admins can only perform actions appropriate to their account type.

sections.title: Data protection
paragraphs: All API inputs are validated server-side. File uploads are scanned for type and size. Sensitive routes are rate-limited to prevent abuse.
We use CSRF protection on state-changing requests and localized error handling to avoid leaking internal system details.

sections.title: Reporting issues
paragraphs: If you discover a security vulnerability, please contact us privately rather than posting publicly. We investigate all good-faith reports promptly.
For account security concerns, change your password immediately and reach out to our support team.

cta.title: Need help with security?
cta.description: Our team can assist with account recovery, suspicious activity, and compliance questions.

HelpPage.subtitle: Support
HelpPage.title: Help
HelpPage.description: Answers to common questions about accounts, jobs, and applications.

faqs.question: How do I create an account?
faqs.answer: Click Sign up, choose Candidate or Recruiter, complete the form, and verify your email. You can update your profile anytime from the Profile page.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a job?
faqs.answer: Open a job listing, click Apply, upload your resume, and submit a cover letter. You can track application status from your Profile under Applications.

faqs.question: How can companies post jobs?
faqs.answer: Register as a Recruiter, complete your company profile, then create job listings from your Profile dashboard. Open roles appear on the Jobs page.

faqs.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
faqs.answer: Use the login page and contact support if you need account recovery assistance. We recommend using a strong, unique password.

faqs.question: Why was my account suspended?
faqs.answer: Accounts may be suspended for policy violations or suspicious activity. Contact support if you believe this was a mistake.

cta.title: Still need help?
cta.description: Reach out to our team and we will respond as soon as possible.

intro.title: Getting oriented
paragraphs: Jobify connects job seekers and companies through a unified platform for discovery, applications, and hiring workflows.
Use the resources below to learn core features, security practices, and integration options.

links.title: Help Center
